channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Indian Diplomat Objects to Misrepresentation of J&K in Dhaka Seminar
item.description: An Indian diplomat lodged a formal protest during a foreign affairs seminar in Dhaka after a presentation by a former Bangladesh diplomat displayed a map depicting Jammu and Kashmir (J&K) as part of P...

item.title: Australian Live Music Industry Struggles with Financial Pressures and Innovation
item.description: The Australian live music industry faces significant challenges, including reduced alcohol sales, rising operational costs, and the lingering impacts of the pandemic. Venues like Lazy Thinking in Sydn...

item.title: Venus Metals advances drilling at Bellchambers gold project
item.description: Venus Metals Corporation has initiated a reverse-circulation drilling program at its Bellchambers gold project in Western Australia, aiming to unlock additional ounces by testing a conceptual explorat...

item.title: DepEd strengthens school safety and learning support for Tacloban students after campus shooting
item.description: Education Secretary Sonny Angara assured students of San Jose National High School (SJNHS) in Tacloban City that the Department of Education (DepEd) is committed to providing a safe, secure, and nurtu...

item.title: Spain Advances to Quarter-Finals with Late Goal Against Portugal
item.description: Spain secured a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Portugal in their World Cup Round of 16 clash, sending Ronaldo off the pitch with his long pursuit of football's biggest prize ending. The decisive goal ca...

item.title: Weave Robotics Introduces Isaac: An $8000 Laundry-Folding Robot for Home Use
item.description: Weave Robotics, a San Francisco startup, has launched Isaac, an $8000 home robot designed to handle laundry folding and basic tidying tasks. The device features two arms, a telescoping frame adjustabl...

item.title: Former Defence Secretary Criticises Treasury's Stance on Defence Spending and NATO Commitments
item.description: Former Defence Secretary John Healey has accused the Treasury of failing to recognise defence spending as an engine for economic growth, despite his resignation over a controversial military funding p...

item.title: El Niño's Potential Impact on South Africa's Agriculture and Food Prices
item.description: Experts are divided on the effects of the anticipated El Niño on South Africa's agriculture, which coincides with the 2026-27 summer crop season. Wandile Sihlobo of Agbiz notes that while El Niño may ...

item.title: Erika Kirk attends hearing on her husband's alleged killer's plea
item.description: The article details the legal proceedings surrounding the case of Tyler Robinson, who is alleged to have killed a 31-year-old Christian nationalist during a campus event in Utah. Erika Kirk, the wife ...

item.title: The Financial Impact of Holding Non-Winning Premium Bonds
item.description: A significant portion of UK residents who hold Premium Bonds have never received a payout, with 62% of holders experiencing no returns. This article highlights the long-term financial consequences of ...

item.title: NDRG2's Role in Endometrial Receptivity and Embryo Implantation
item.description: This study investigates the expression pattern and regulatory role of NDRG2 during embryonic implantation. Researchers examined NDRG2 expression in human and mouse endometrial tissues across different...

item.title: Canada's World Cup Loss to Morocco Draws Record TV Audience
item.description: Canada’s 3-0 defeat to Morocco in the round of 16 during the FIFA World Cup attracted a record television audience, according to Bell Media. Preliminary Numeris data revealed the match averaged 5.4 mi...

item.title: Benue Governor Updates Tinubu on Security, IDPs, and Political Landscape Post-50th Anniversary
item.description: Benue State Governor Hyacinth Alia met with President Bola Tinubu at the Presidential Villa in Abuja to discuss security, the return of internally displaced persons (IDPs), ongoing projects, and polit...

item.title: Tanzania Advocates for Inclusive Global AI Governance Frameworks
item.description: Tanzania has called on the international community to collaborate in creating fair and transparent rules for artificial intelligence (AI) governance. Minister Angellah Kairuki, head of Communication a...

item.title: Tragedy in Sulu: Two Killed, 11 Injured in Highway Accident
item.description: A tragic road accident in Sulu left two men dead and 11 others injured after a truck they were riding in blew a tire and rolled over along the highway in Barangay Tagbak, Indanan. Lt. Col. Francis Bri...

item.title: Gujarat lioness attack: Man survives encounter with wild animal
item.description: A lioness attacked a man in Garajiya village, Gujarat's Bhavnagar district, on July 6, 2026, capturing the incident on camera. The victim, Kalubhai Parmar, remained still during the attack, even attem...

item.title: Trump intervenes in FIFA red card review as Infantino defends disciplinary process
item.description: US President Donald Trump has confirmed he personally contacted FIFA President Gianni Infantino to request a review of Folarin Balogun's red card, which was issued to the American player during a Worl...

item.title: Fritz Advances to Wimbledon Quarterfinals; Noskova and Paolini Make Impacts
item.description: Taylor Fritz, the sixth seed, secured his fourth consecutive Wimbledon quarterfinal appearance by defeating Alexander Bublik in three sets (7-6(1), 6-4, 6-4) on Court One. The match highlighted Fritz'...

item.title: 1939 Alfa Romeo 6C 2500 Sport Berlinetta: A Rare Pre-War Italian Grand Tourer
item.description: The 1939 Alfa Romeo 6C 2500 Sport Berlinetta represents the pinnacle of pre-war Italian automotive engineering. Crafted by the renowned coachbuilder Touring, this grand tourer combines sleek design wi...

item.title: Canada's Government to Fund Spending Through Deficits and Economic Growth
item.description: Finance Minister François-Philippe Champagne announced that the federal government plans to finance its recent large-scale spending initiatives through a combination of economic growth and increased d...
